White Sangria
=============

*   Feb 28, 2022
*   1 min read

Updated: Mar 3, 2022

1 bottle (750ml) dry white wine

¼ cup light rum

3 tbsp elderflower liqueur

2 tbsp sugar

2 sliced nectarines

2 sliced plums

1 ½ cup seltzer

Mix together in a pitcher and serve!

title: Key Lime Cookies
ingredients: Zest of 3 key limes, preferred (or 1 regular lime)
2 tbsp key lime juice (or regular lime juice)
instructions:
Preheat the oven to 375°
Line cookie sheets with parchment paper and set aside.
In a large bowl, mix the butter and sugar until creamy. Add the egg until well blended.
Add the lime zest and blend.
Add the flour ½ cup at a time until completely blended.
Using a small cookie scoop or tablespoon scoop the dough and form into a ball. Place the ball on a cookie sheet and slightly flatten with your palm.
Bake for 9-10 minutes or until the center is set. Th cookies will not brown. Let the cookies completely cool on a cooling rack or parchment paper.
In a small shallow bowl, mix the glaze ingredients until smooth.
Once the cookies have cooled, dip the tops of the cookies into the glaze and return them to the rack or paper to dry.
These cookies taste great refrigerated.

Key Lime Cookies Makes 4 Dozen Cookies
===============

top of page

[My Mom's Home Cooking](https://www.mymomshomecooking.com/)

Use tab to navigate through the menu items.

Key Lime Cookies Makes 4 Dozen Cookies
======================================

*   Dec 24, 2023
*   1 min read

1 cup butter, softened

¾ cup sugar

1 large egg

Zest of 3 key limes, preferred (or 1 regular lime)

2 cups flour

½ tsp baking powder

½ tsp salt

Glaze

1 ½ cup powdered sugar

2 tbsp key lime juice (or regular lime juice)

1 tbsp heavy cream

Preheat the oven to 375°

Line cookie sheets with parchment paper and set aside.

In a large bowl, mix the butter and sugar until creamy. Add the egg until well blended.

Add the lime zest and blend.

Add the flour ½ cup at a time until completely blended.

Using a small cookie scoop or tablespoon scoop the dough and form into a ball. Place the ball on a cookie sheet and slightly flatten with your palm.

Bake for 9-10 minutes or until the center is set. Th cookies will not brown. Let the cookies completely cool on a cooling rack or parchment paper.

In a small shallow bowl, mix the glaze ingredients until smooth.

Once the cookies have cooled, dip the tops of the cookies into the glaze and return them to the rack or paper to dry.

These cookies taste great refrigerated.

![Image 1](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/75d545_f4487a3b014042179d4f3c23c6112f7d~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_740,h_555,al_c,q_90,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/75d545_f4487a3b014042179d4f3c23c6112f7d~mv2.png)

title: Pasta Fagioli
ingredients: 28 oz can petite diced tomatoes, undrained
instructions:
Cook sausage over medium heat in a large saucepan until no longer pink, breaking into small pieces as it cooks. Drain and set aside.
In the same pan used for the sausage, heat the olive oil and stir in the carrots, garlic, celery and onion and cook until tender. About 5 minutes.
Place the vegetable mixture in a large stock pot and add the tomato sauce, diced tomatoes, ditalini, chicken broth, parsley, basil, red pepper flakes, and black pepper. Reduce the heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
Add the beans, spinach, and sausage to the soup and simmer for another couple of minutes or until the spinach has wilted and the beans are heated through.
Serve garnished with Parmesan cheese, and with your favorite warm bread!

Pasta Fagioli Serves 8-10
===============

[My Mom's Home Cooking](https://www.mymomshomecooking.com/)

*   More    

Use tab to navigate through the menu items.

Pasta Fagioli Serves 8-10
=========================

*   Jan 30, 2024
*   1 min read

1lb ground sweet Italian sausage

2 Tbsp Extra Virgin Olive Oil

1 ½ cup shredded carrots

1 medium Vidalia onion, diced small

4 stalks celery, diced small

6 cloves of garlic, minced

17oz Pomi tomato sauce

28 oz can petite diced tomatoes, undrained

2 32oz chicken broth

4 Tbsp lightly dried parsley (Gourmet Garden)

1 Tbsp lightly dried basil(Gourmet Garden)

½ tsp red pepper flakes

Salt and Pepper, to taste

16oz ditalini pasta or orecchiette

2 15oz cans of cannellini beans

5oz baby spinach

Grated parmesan, for garnish

Cook sausage over medium heat in a large saucepan until no longer pink, breaking into small pieces as it cooks. Drain and set aside.

In the same pan used for the sausage, heat the olive oil and stir in the carrots, garlic, celery and onion and cook until tender. About 5 minutes.

Place the vegetable mixture in a large stock pot and add the tomato sauce, diced tomatoes, ditalini, chicken broth, parsley, basil, red pepper flakes, and black pepper. Reduce the heat and simmer for 20 minutes.

Add the beans, spinach, and sausage to the soup and simmer for another couple of minutes or until the spinach has wilted and the beans are heated through.

Serve garnished with Parmesan cheese, and with your favorite warm bread!
